name: storage
identity: A secondary structure within the settlement, designed for storing food, tools, and other essential supplies. It is separated from the main living area and is a key part of the settlement's expansion and organization.
current_status: Serving as a designated storage area for cultivated food, tools, and preserved items. It is part of the settlement's planned expansion and is considered essential for the tribe's sustainability. It is also a central hub for the tribe's knowledge and resource management during the new growth cycle outlined by the leader. It plays a role in the tribe's careful experimentation and observation of new growth patterns.

appearance.value: Functional, reinforced structure with designated areas for storage and preservation

role.value: Storage and preservation of food, tools, and knowledge

volatile_state.location: Within the settlement, near the longhouse
volatile_state.current_activity: Used for storing cultivated food, tools, and preserved items, and as a central hub for knowledge and resource management during the new growth cycle. It is also involved in the tribe's careful experimentation and observation of new growth patterns. It serves as a location for the tribe's collaborative efforts and knowledge-sharing processes.
